signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2.16%, up slightly from 2.00% in February 2026.** | YES | HIGH confidence[2]

This monthly figure, based on Consumer Price Index data for March 2026 (CPI at 118.8), shows a year-over-year rise with 0.34% month-to-month inflation from February[2]. No full-year 2026 data exists yet (2024 annual was ~2.32%)[1][3], but the uptick aligns with
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: Goldman Sachs Files for Bitcoin ETF, Boosting BTC to $75K+** | YES | MED
signals.raw:
Goldman Sachs Files for Bitcoin ETF, Boosting BTC to $75K+** | YES | MED  
Goldman Sachs filed for a Bitcoin ETF as of April 15 recap, coinciding with BTC up 0.9% to $75,049 and $597M in two-day ETF inflows, potentially influencing markets like Polymarket's BTC price bets above $62K (100% odds short-term)[3][6].
matched_markets: Bitcoin Up or Down - April 16, 10PM ET

signals.headline: US Spot Ethereum ETFs Record $169M Net Inflows on April 15, Largest in 2 Months Amid Institutional Interest** | YES | HI
signals.raw:
US Spot Ethereum ETFs Record $169M Net Inflows on April 15, Largest in 2 Months Amid Institutional Interest** | YES | HIGH  
Ethereum spot ETFs saw $169 million in net inflows on Wednesday (April 15, 2026), signaling renewed institutional buying and staking activity by validators, which could drive price momentum and shift prediction markets on ETH price targets[5].
